{{Short description|Men's association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Dominican Republic women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=November 2023}}
{{Infobox national football team
| Name                  = Dominican Republic
| Badge                 = Federación Dominicana de Fútbol logo (2025).svg
| Badge_size            = 185px
| Nickname              = ''Quisqueyanos''
| Association           = [[Dominican Football Federation|Federación Dominicana de Fútbol]] (FEDOFUTBOL)
| Confederation         = [[CONCACAF]] (North America)
| Sub-confederation     = [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] (Caribbean)
| Coach                 = [[Marcelo Neveleff]]
| Captain               = Jean Carlos López
| Most caps             = [[Jean Carlos López]] (71)
| Top scorer            = [[Dorny Romero]] (28)
| Home Stadium          = [[#Home stadium|Various]]
| FIFA Trigramme        = DOM
| FIFA Rank             = {{FIFA World Rankings|DOM}}
| FIFA max              = 76
| FIFA max date         = October 2013
| FIFA min              = 189
| FIFA min date         = December 2009
| Elo Rank              = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Dominican Republic}}
| Elo max               = 139
| Elo max date          = 7 December 2012
| Elo min               = 188
| Elo min date          = early 1993
| pattern_la1           = _dom25h
| pattern_b1            = _dom25h
| pattern_ra1           = _dom25h
| pattern_sh1           = _dom25h
| pattern_so1           = 
| leftarm1              = 002859
| body1                 = 002859
| rightarm1             = 002859
| shorts1               = 002859
| socks1                = 002859
| pattern_la2           = _dom25a
| pattern_b2            = _dom25a
| pattern_ra2           = _dom25a
| pattern_sh2           = _dom25a
| pattern_so2           = 
| leftarm2              = ffffff
| body2                 = ffffff
| rightarm2             = ffffff
| shorts2               = ffffff
| socks2                = ffffff
| First game            = {{fb|DOM}} 0–8 {{fb-rt|HAI|1964}}<br>([[Santo Domingo]], [[Dominican Republic]]; 21 May 1967)
| Largest win           = {{nowrap|{{fb|DOM}} 17–0 {{fb-rt|VGB}}<br>([[San Cristóbal, Dominican Republic]]; 14 October 2010)}}
| Largest loss          = {{fb|TRI}} 9–0 {{fb-rt|DOM}}<br>([[Port of Spain]], [[Trinidad and Tobago]]; 8 October 2008)
| Regional name         = [[CONCACAF Gold Cup]]
| Regional cup apps     = 1
| Regional cup first    = [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]
| Regional cup best     = Group stage ([[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]])
}}

The '''Dominican Republic national football team''' ({{langx|es|Selección de fútbol de República Dominicana}}) represents the [[Dominican Republic]] in men's international [[Association football|football]], which is governed by the [[Dominican Football Federation|Federación Dominicana de Fútbol]] ({{langx|en|Dominican Football Federation}}) founded in 1953. It has been an affiliate member of [[FIFA]] since 1958 and an affiliate member of [[CONCACAF]] since 1964. Regionally, it is an affiliate member of [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] in the Caribbean Zone.

The Dominican Republic has never participated in the [[FIFA World Cup]], but has qualified once for the [[CONCACAF Gold Cup]] in [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]], and has also participated four times in League B of the [[CONCACAF Nations League]].

As of June 5th 2025, the Dominican Republic is currently ranked 139th in the [[FIFA Men's World Rankings|FIFA World Rankings]]. As is the case in many other [[Caribbean]] nations, association football has not traditionally been the most popular sport in the Dominican Republic. Interest in [[baseball]] diverts away from football and contributes to the country's lack of success in any major football tournament qualification.

==History==
The Dominican Football Federation was founded in 1953 and joined [[FIFA]] in 1959. The national team played their first games in May 1967&nbsp;– a two-legged qualifier against [[Haiti national football team|Haiti]] for a place in the [[football at the 1968 Summer Olympics]] of [[Mexico]]. The first leg was played at home on 21 May and Haiti won 8–0. The second leg in Haiti was won by the hosts 6–0 on 27 May, as Haiti went through 14–0 on aggregate.{{citation needed|date=November 2021}}

The Dominican Republic did not play another match until March 1970, when they entered at the [[1970 Central American and Caribbean Games]] in [[Panama]]. They were placed in a group with [[Puerto Rico national football team|Puerto Rico]] and [[Venezuela national football team|Venezuela]]. The Dominican Republic lost 5–0 to Venezuela on 4 March, then gained their first ever win on 6 March by beating Puerto Rico 5–0. They did not advance to the next round.{{citation needed|date=November 2021}}

In 1971 the Dominican Republic entered the [[1971 Pan American Games]] in [[Colombia]] and were drawn in a group against the [[Bahamas national football team|Bahamas]] and [[Canada men's national soccer team|Canada]]. They lost 4–2 to the Bahamas on 31 July and 4–0 to Canada on 2 August and were knocked out.{{citation needed|date=November 2021}}

The team did not play again until 16 December 1973, when they lost 1–0 away to Venezuela. In 1974 the Dominican Republic held the [[1974 Central American and Caribbean Games|Central American and Caribbean Games]], and lost their first match 3–2 to [[Bermuda national football team|Bermuda]] on 28 February. On 2 March the team lost 1–0 to [[Mexico national football team|Mexico]], before beating the Bahamas 2–0 on 4 March. In the final group game on 8 March the Dominican Republic lost 3–2 to [[Panama national football team|Panama]] and were knocked out.<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesd/domrep-intres.html |title=Dominican Republic - List of International Matches |access-date=2 February 2023 |archive-date=23 March 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230323140222/https://www.rsssf.org/tablesd/domrep-intres.html |url-status=live}}</ref>
In 1986 they had their best result in the Central American and Caribbean games finishing 3rd

[[File:DC United vs. Deportivo Árabe Unido (20).jpg|thumb|150px|right|[[Miguel Lloyd]] played numerous games for the Dominican Republic]]

In 2012, the Dominicans were able to qualify for the [[2012 Caribbean Cup]]. On 7 December they beat hosts [[Antigua and Barbuda national football team|Antigua and Barbuda]] 2–1 but fell 2–1 against [[Haiti national football team|Haiti]] and [[Trinidad and Tobago national football team|Trinidad and Tobago]].

In 2024, Dominican Republic won all of their [[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League B]] matches against [[Bermuda national football team|Bermuda]], [[Dominica national football team|Dominica]] and [[Antigua and Barbuda national football team|Antigua and Barbuda]] which sees them promoted to League A as group leaders and also qualifying to the nations first continent tournament in their history, the [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup]].

==Team image==
=== Kit sponsorship ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Kit supplier
! Period                 || 1953
|- 
| {{flagicon|DOM}} Drako || 2006
|-
| {{flagicon|UK}} [[Umbro]] || 2007–2010
|-
| {{flagicon|GER}} [[Adidas]] || 2011–2013
|-
| {{flagicon|PER}} [[Walon Sport|Walon]] || 2014–2016
|-
| None || 2017–2018
|-
| {{flagicon|ITA}} [[Macron (sportswear)|Macron]]
| 2019&ndash;2024
|-
| {{flagicon|MEX}} Silver Sport
| 2024–present
|}

==Home stadium==
The Dominican Republic national team uses the following stadiums for their home games:
[[Cibao FC Stadium]],
[[Felix Sanchez Stadium]], and
[[Estadio Panamericano, San Cristóbal]].

==Results and fixtures==
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup Group A|2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup]]
|date       = 18 June
|time       = {{UTZ|18:00|−5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CRC}}
|score      = 2–1
|team2      = {{fb|DOM}}
|report     = https://www.concacaf.com/en/gold-cup/game-details?competition=f51991ex45qhp1p3iu74u4d4e&season=5r564yyrugptqzsrsphcyk7pw&match=7s5x4a385o8clvi9gvpjwihp0
|goals1     = 
*[[Manfred Ugalde|Ugalde]] {{goal|44|pen.}}
*[[Josimar Alcócer|Alcócer]] {{goal|85}}
| goals2     =
*[[Joao Urbáez]] {{goal|16}}
|location   = [[Arlington, Texas|Arlington]], United States
|stadium    = [[AT&T Stadium]]
|attendance = 34,015
|referee    = Lukasz Szpala ([[United States Soccer Federation|United States]])
|result     = L
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup Group A|2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup]]
|date       = 22 June
|time       = {{UTZ|21:00|−5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|DOM}}
|score      = 0–0
|team2      = {{fb|SUR}}
|report     = https://www.concacaf.com/en/gold-cup/game-details?competition=f51991ex45qhp1p3iu74u4d4e&season=5r564yyrugptqzsrsphcyk7pw&match=7y0chivfymbl849hp8zj6lyxg
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = [[Arlington, Texas|Arlington]], United States
|stadium    = [[AT&T Stadium]]
|attendance = 20,918
|referee    = Ismael Cornejo ([[Salvadoran Football Federation|El Salvador]])
|result     = D
}}
{{Football box collapsible
| format    = 1
|round      = [[Exhibition_game#Association_football|Friendly]]
| date      = 9 September
| time      = {{UTZ|20:00|3}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|JOR}}
|score      = 3–0
|team2      = {{fb|DOM}}
|report     = https://www.vavel.com/en-us/soccer/2025/09/09/1233157-jordan-vs-dominican-republic-live-score-friendly.html
|goals1     =
*[[Ali Olwan|Olwan]] {{goal|7}}
*[[Ibrahim Sadeh|Sadeh]] {{goal|48}}
*[[Mohammad Abu Zrayq|Abu Zaryq]] {{goal|90+3}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[Amman]], Jordan
|stadium    = [[Amman International Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    =
|result     = L 
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[Exhibition game#Association football|Friendly]]
|date       = 10 October
|time       = {{UTZ|20:45|+8}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|URU}}
|score      = 1–0
|team2      = {{fb|DOM}}
|report     = https://www.bbc.com/sport/football/live/c1ed584p224t
|goals1     =
*[[Ignacio Laquintana|Laquintana]] {{goal|60}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[Kuala Lumpur]], Malaysia
|stadium    = [[Bukit Jalil National Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Razlan Joffri Ali]] ([[Football Association of Malaysia|Malaysia]])
| result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 12 November
|time       = {{UTZ|20:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|DOM}}
|score      = 2–0
|team2      = {{fb|VIN}}
|report     = https://www.flashscore.com/match/football/dominican-republic-nB5iYoh5/saint-vincent-and-the-grenadines-WferpEKe/
|goals1     =[[Heinz Mörschel|Mörschel]] {{goal|17}},[[Erick Japa|Japa]] {{goal|57}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[Santiago de los caballeros|Santiago]], Dominican Republic 
|stadium    = [[Estadio Cibao FC]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
| result     = W
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 18 November
|time       = {{UTZ|19:30|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|DOM}}
|score      = 0–0
|team2      = {{fb|MTQ}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = [[Santiago de los caballeros|Santiago]], Dominican Republic 
|stadium    = [[Estadio Cibao FC]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
| result    = D 
}}

===2026===
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 26 March
|time       = {{UTZ|20:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|DOM}}
|score      = 2–2
|team2      = {{fb|SLV}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-27/dominican-republic-vs-el-salvador/4095364
|goals1     =
* [[Junior Firpo|Firpo]] {{goal|15}}
* [[Dorny Romero|Romero]] {{goal|90+4|pen}}
|goals2     =
* [[Nathan Ordaz|Ordaz]] {{goal|62||78}}
|location   = [[Santiago de los caballeros|Santiago]], Dominican Republic 
|stadium    = [[Estadio Cibao FC]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Oliver Vergara]] ([[Panamanian Football Federation|Panama]])
| result    = D
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 29 March
|time       = {{UTZ|18:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|DOM}}
|score      = 1–1
|team2      = {{fb|CUB}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-30/dominican-republic-vs-cuba/4095370
|goals1     = [[Dorny Romero|Romero]] {{goal|53}}
|goals2     = [[Dairon Reyes|D. Reyes]] {{goal|51}}
|location   = [[Santiago de los caballeros|Santiago]], Dominican Republic 
|stadium    = [[Estadio Cibao FC]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Roger Mélendez ([[Nicaraguan Football Federation|Nicaragua]])
| result    = D
}}
{{footballbox collapsible|format=1
| round      = [[Exhibition game#International football|Friendly]]
| date       = 3 June
| time       = {{UTZ|17:45|-5}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|PAN}}
| score      = 4–2
| team2      = {{fb|DOM}}
| report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-06-04/panama-vs-dominican-republic/4298695
| goals1     =
*[[Tomás Rodríguez (footballer)|T. Rodríguez]] {{goal|16}}
*[[Víctor Griffith|Griffith]] {{goal|44}}
*[[Cecilio Waterman|Waterman]] {{goal|57}}
*[[Kadir Barría|Barría]] {{goal|89}}
| goals2     =
*[[Mariano Díaz|Díaz]] {{goal|47}}
*[[Erick Japa|Japa]] {{goal|67}}
| location   = [[Panama City]], Panama
| stadium    = [[Estadio Rommel Fernández]]
| attendance =
| referee    = Nelson Salgado ([[Football Federation of Honduras|Honduras]])
| result     = L
}}

== Coaching staff ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
!style="color:#FFFFFF;background:darkblue"|Position
!style="color:#FFFFFF;background:darkblue"|Name
!style="color:#FFFFFF;background:darkblue"|Nationality
|-
| Head coach
| [[Marcelo Neveleff]]
| {{flagu|Argentina}}
|-
| Assistant coach
| [[Inaki Goikoetxea]]
| {{flagu|Spain}}
|-
| Assistant coach
| [[Juan Francisco Roldán]]
| {{flagu|Guatemala}}
|- 
|  Goalkeeper trainer
| [[Dani Gimenez]]
| {{flagu|Spain}}
|-
| Fitness trainer 
| [[Juan Manuel Alcedo]]
| {{flagu|Spain}}
|- 
| Athletic trainer
| [[Juanma Alcedo]]
| {{flagu|Spain}}
|- 
|}

===Coaching history===
{{div col|colwidth=25em}}
*{{Flagicon|BOL}} [[Fortunato Quispe Mendoza]] (1967–1974)
*{{Flagicon|ARG}} [[Carlos Cabañés]] (1975)
*{{Flagicon|BRA}} [[Décio Leite Leal]] (1986–1989)
*{{Flagicon|GER}} [[Bernhard Zgoll]] (1991–1992)
*{{Flagicon|GER}} [[Manfred Höner]] (1993–1994)
*{{Flagicon|DOM}} [[Juan Carretero]] (1995–1999)
*{{Flagicon|DOM}} [[Juan Emilio Mojica]] (2000–2002)
*{{Flagicon|ESP}} [[Carmelo Oliva]] (2003)
*{{Flagicon|CUB}} [[William Bennett Barracks|William Bennett]] (2004–2005)
*{{Flagicon|SER|2004}} [[Ljubomir Crnokrak]] (2005–2007)
*{{Flagicon|DOM}} [[Juan Emilio Mojica]] (2008–2009)
*{{Flagicon|CUB}} [[Clemente Domingo Hernández]] (2010–2014)
*{{Flagicon|COL}} [[José Eugenio Hernández]] (2015)
*{{Flagicon|DOM}} [[Juan Emilio Mojica]]  (2015)
*{{Flagicon|ESP}} [[Roberto Díaz Bernabé]]  (2015–2016)
*{{Flagicon|URU}} [[Orlando Capellino]] (2017–2019)
*{{Flagicon|ESP}} [[David González (football manager)|David González]] (2019–2020)
*{{Flagicon|MEX}} [[Jacques Passy]] (2020–2021)
*{{Flagicon|ESP}} [[Iñaki Bea]] (2022)
*{{Flagicon|CUB}} [[Walter Benítez (manager)|Walter Benítez]] (2022–2023)
*{{Flagicon|ARG}} [[Marcelo Neveleff]] (2023–present)
{{div col end}}

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players have been called up for the [[Exhibition game#International football|friendly]] match against [[Panama national football team|Panama]] on 3 June 2026.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.fedofutbol.do/rd-presenta-convocados-para-partido-ante-panama-que-servira-de-despedida-para-miguel-lloyd/|title=RD presenta convocados para partido ante Panamá que servirá de despedida para Miguel Lloyd|trans-title=DR announces its roster for the match against Panama, which will serve as a farewell for Miguel Lloyd|publisher=[[Dominican Football Federation]]|date=25 May 2026}}</ref>

''Caps and goals are correct as of 29 March 2026, after the match against [[Cuba national football team|Cuba]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Miguel Lloyd]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1982|10|23}}|caps=54|goals=0|club=[[Cibao FC|Cibao]]|clubnat=DOM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Xavier Valdez]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|11|23}}|caps=24|goals=0|club=[[Nashville SC]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Edwin Frías]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2006|5|18}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Cibao FC|Cibao]]|clubnat=DOM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Anthony Núñez]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2005|10|14}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Mansfield Town F.C.|Mansfield Town]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Luiyi de Lucas]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1994|8|31}}|caps=29|goals=1|club=[[Krasava ENY Ypsonas FC|Krasava Ypsonas]]|clubnat=CYP}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Joao Urbáez]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2002|7|24}}|caps=19|goals=1|club=[[Flamurtari FC|Flamurtari]]|clubnat=ALB}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Noah Dollenmayer]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1999|10|26}}|caps=13|goals=2|club=[[El Paso Locomotive FC]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jeremy Báez]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1999|11|21}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Atlético Pantoja]]|clubnat=DOM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Alejandro López (footballer, born 2009)|Alejandro López]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2009|1|28}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Rayo Vallecano]]|clubnat=ESP}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Brayan Ademán]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2002|9|22}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Gimnástica de Torrelavega|Gimnástica Torrelavega]]|clubnat=ESP}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Israel Boatwright]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2005|6|2}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Inter Miami CF]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jean Carlos López]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1993|11|9}}|caps=71|goals=7|club=[[Cibao FC|Cibao]]|clubnat=DOM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Lucas Bretón]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2006|11|20}}|caps=15|goals=0|club=[[Málaga CF|Málaga]]|clubnat=ESP}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Pablo Rosario]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1997|1|7}}|caps=12|goals=0|club=[[FC Porto|Porto]]|clubnat=POR}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Manny Rodríguez]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1998|5|23}}|caps=8|goals=1|club=[[Linares Deportivo]]|clubnat=ESP}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Yordy Álvarez]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2005|3|12}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Atlético Pantoja]]|clubnat=DOM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Alessandro Ovalle]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2005|12|19}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[ACD Sant'Angelo 1907|Sant'Angelo]]|clubnat=ITA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Dorny Romero]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1998|1|24}}|caps=50|goals=28|club=[[Club Bolívar|Bolívar]]|clubnat=BOL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Edarlyn Reyes]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1997|9|30}}|caps=43|goals=5|club=[[FC Arsenal Tula|Arsenal Tula]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Erick Japa]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1999|4|6}}|caps=21|goals=4|club=[[S.D. Aucas|Aucas]]|clubnat=ECU}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Juanca Pineda]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2000|1|12}}|caps=19|goals=0|club=[[PFC Beroe Stara Zagora|Beroe]]|clubnat=BUL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Peter González (footballer)|Peter González]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2002|7|25}}|caps=9|goals=2|club=[[Real Valladolid|Valladolid]]|clubnat=ESP}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Mariano Díaz]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1993|8|1}}|caps=4|goals=3|club=[[Deportivo Alavés|Alavés]]|clubnat=ESP}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Adrián García (Dominican footballer)|Adrián García]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2009|2|13}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[CD Leganés|Leganés]]|clubnat=ESP}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Anyelo Gómez]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|1|2}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[O&M FC|O&M]]|clubnat=DOM}}
{{nat fs end}}

===Recent callups===
The following players have been called up for the team in the last 12 months and are still available for selection.
<!--Sorted by position, most recent call-up, caps, goals and last name.-->
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Noam Baumann]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1996|4|10}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Albirex Niigata]]|clubnat=JPN|latest=v. {{fb|URU}}, 10 October 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Anthony Núñez]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2005|10|14}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Mansfield Town]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|JOR}}, 9 September 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Wilkins Geraldo]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2008|5|27}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[CF Rayo Majadahonda|Rayo Majadahonda]]|clubnat=ESP|latest=v. {{fb|SUR}}, 22 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Junior Firpo]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1996|8|22}}|caps=15|goals=5|club=[[Real Betis|Betis]]|clubnat=ESP|latest=[[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Juan Castillo (footballer, born 2000)|Juan Castillo]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2000|1|13}}|caps=10|goals=0|club=[[RKC Waalwijk]]|clubnat=NED|latest=[[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Marlon Mena]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2006|10|5}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Parma Calcio 1913 Youth Sector|Parma U20]]|clubnat=ITA|latest=[[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Edgar Pujol]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2004|8|7}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Racing de Ferrol]]|clubnat=ESP|latest=v. {{fb|MTQ}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jimmy Kaparos]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2001|12|25}}|caps=7|goals=1|club=[[Patro Eisden Maasmechelen|Patro]]|clubnat=BEL|latest=v. {{fb|MTQ}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Charbel Wehbe (footballer)|Charbel Wehbe]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2004|5|8}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[CD Castellón B|Castellón B]]|clubnat=ESP| latest=v. {{fb|MTQ}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Joselvis Martínez]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2005|5|24}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Delfines del Este FC|Delfines delEste]]|clubnat=DOM| latest=v. {{fb|MTQ}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Miguel Ángel Beltré]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|7|12}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[CD Azuqueca|Azuqueca]]|clubnat=ESP|latest=v. {{fb|URU}}, 10 October 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jose Abreu (footballer)|Jose Abreu]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2008|1|5}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Delfines Del Este]]|clubnat=DOM|latest=v. {{fb|URU}}, 10 October 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Michael Sambataro]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2002|12|4}}|caps=15|goals=1|club=[[Club Social y Deportivo Liniers|Liniers]]|clubnat=ARG|latest=v. {{fb|JOR}}, 9 September 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[José Francisco]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2000|5|11}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Moca FC|Moca]]|clubnat=DOM|latest=v. {{fb|JOR}}, 9 September 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Ronaldo Vásquez]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1999|6|30}}|caps=53|goals=7|club=[[Sumgayit FK|Sumgayit]]|clubnat=AZE|latest=[[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Edison Azcona]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|11|21}}|caps=18|goals=1|club=[[Las Vegas Lights FC|Las Vegas Lights]]|clubnat=USA|latest=[[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Heinz Mörschel]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|1997|8|24}}|caps=23|goals=9|club=[[F.C. Vizela|Vizela]]|clubnat=POR|latest=v. {{fb|MTQ}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Omar de la Cruz (footballer)|Omar de la Cruz]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2000|7|5}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Cibao FC|Cibao]]|clubnat=DOM|latest=v. {{fb|MTQ}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Fabian Messina]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2002|9|16}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Arenas Club de Getxo|Arenas]]|clubnat=ESP|latest=v. {{fb|URU}}, 10 October 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Ángel Montes de Oca]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|2|18}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[UD Caravaca|Caravaca]]|clubnat=ESP|latest=v. {{fb|SUR}}, 22 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=16|pos=FW|name=[[Carlos Sarante]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2006|6|3}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Atlético Pantoja|Pantoja]]|clubnat=DOM|latest=[[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Óscar Ureña]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|5|31}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[FC Barcelona Atlètic|Barcelona B]]|clubnat=ESP|latest=v. {{fb|MTQ}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Edwarlyn Reyes]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2004|5|2}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Cibao FC|Cibao]]|clubnat=DOM|latest=v. {{fb|MTQ}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Luis Meneses]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2006|12|28}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[CA Rentistas|Rentistas]]|clubnat=URU|latest=v. {{fb|URU}}, 10 October 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Javier Roces]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2005|9|10}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Cibao FC|Cibao]]|clubnat=DOM|latest=v. {{fb|URU}}, 10 October 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Rafael Núñez (footballer)|Rafael Núñez]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2002|1|25}}|caps=14|goals=3|club= [[CD Eldense|Eldense]]|clubnat=ESP|latest=v. {{fb|SUR}}, 22 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
;Notes
*<sup>INJ</sup> = Withdrew due to injury
*<sup>PRE</sup> = Preliminary squad
*<sup>RET</sup> = Retired from the national team
*<sup>SUS</sup> = Serving suspension
*<sup>WD</sup> = Player withdrew from the squad due to non-injury issue.
{{nat fs end}}

==Records==
{{Updated|29 March 2026}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Dominican Republic |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/54/Dominican_Republic.html |website=National Football Teams |access-date=19 June 2023 |archive-date=6 July 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230706062257/https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/54/2023/Dominican_Republic.html |url-status=live}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with the Dominican Republic.''

===Most appearances===


{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Jean Carlos López]]'''
|70
|7
|2013–present
|-
|2
|style="text-align: left;" |[[César García Peralta|César García]]
|57
|4
|2010–2024
|-
|rowspan=2|3
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Miguel Lloyd]]'''
|53
|0
|2004–present 
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Ronaldo Vásquez]]'''
|53
|7
|2017–present
|-
|5
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Dorny Romero]]'''
|49
|28
|2017–present 
|-
|6
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Rafael Flores (footballer)|Rafael Flores]]
|48
|0
|2008–2021
|-
|7
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Jonathan Faña]]
|47
|24
|2006–2022
|-
|8
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Domingo Peralta]]
|44
|14
|2010–2021
|-
|9
|style="text-align: left;"| '''[[Edarlyn Reyes]]'''
|42
|5
|2018–present
|-
|10
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Kerbi Rodríguez]]
|38
|10
|2006–2015
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Dorny Romero]]'''
|28
|49
|{{#expr:28/49 round 2}}
|2019–present
|- 
|2
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Jonathan Faña]]
|24
|47
|{{#expr:24/47 round 2}}
|2006–2022
|-
|3
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Domingo Peralta]]
|14
|44
|{{#expr:14/44 round 2}}
|2010–2021
|-
|4
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Dinardo Rodríguez]]
|11
|15
|{{#expr:11/15 round 2}}
|1989–2001
|-
|5
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Kerbi Rodríguez]]
|10
|38
|{{#expr:10/38 round 2}}
|2006–2015
|-
|rowspan=3|6
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Darly Batista]]
|9
|18
|{{#expr:9/18 round 2}}
|2006–2019
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Heinz Mörschel]]'''
|9
|23
|{{#expr:9/23 round 2}}
|2023–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Erick Ozuna López|Erick Ozuna]]
|9
|30
|{{#expr:9/30 round 2}}
|2010–2019
|-
|rowspan=4|9
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Inoel Navarro]]
|7
|16
|{{#expr:7/16 round 2}}
|2010–2015
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Omar Zapata]]
|7
|18
|{{#expr:7/18 round 2}}
|1992–2004
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Ronaldo Vásquez]]'''
|7
|53
|{{#expr:7/53 round 2}}
|2017–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Jean Carlos López]]'''
|7
|70
|{{#expr:7/70 round 2}}
|2013–present
|-
|}

==Competitive record==

===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[FIFA World Cup]]
!rowspan=28|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]]
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}} 
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
| [[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1958 FIFA World Cup|1958]]
| colspan=8|''Not a FIFA member''
| colspan=6|''Not a FIFA member''
|-
| [[1962 FIFA World Cup|1962]] to [[1974 FIFA World Cup|1974]]
| colspan=8|''Did not enter''
| colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|Argentina}} [[1978 FIFA World Cup|1978]]
| colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 6
|-
| [[1982 FIFA World Cup|1982]] to [[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]]
| colspan=8|''Did not enter''
| colspan=6|''Declined participation''
|-
| {{flagicon|United States}} [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]
| colspan=8 rowspan=9|''Did not qualify''
| 2
| 0
| 1
| 1
| 2
| 3
|-
| {{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]
| 6
| 3
| 1
| 2
| 9
| 16
|-
| {{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
| 4
| 2
| 0
| 2
| 6
| 5
|-
| {{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
| 4
| 1
| 1
| 2
| 6
| 6
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
| 1
| 0
| 0
| 1
| 0
| 1
|-
| {{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
| 8
| 4
| 2
| 2
| 18
| 8
|-
| {{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 1
| 5
|-
| {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
| 4
| 2
| 1
| 1
| 8
| 4
|-
| {{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
| 4
| 2
| 0
| 2
| 11
| 5
|-
| {{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]
| colspan=8|''To be determined''
| colspan=6|''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
| colspan=8|''To be determined''
| colspan=6|''To be determined''
|-
!Total
! 
!{{Tooltip|0/16|Number of tournaments qualified for}}
! 
! 
! 
! 
!
!
!37
!14 
!6 
!17
!61 
!59
|}

===CONCACAF Gold Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"   
|-
!colspan=9|[[CONCACAF Championship]] & [[CONCACAF Gold Cup|Gold Cup]] record 
!width=1% rowspan=31|
!colspan=6|[[CONCACAF Gold Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|- 
| {{flagicon|El Salvador}} [[1963 CONCACAF Championship|1963]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=6|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|Guatemala}} [[1965 CONCACAF Championship|1965]] 
|-  
|{{flagicon|Honduras|1949}} [[1967 CONCACAF Championship|1967]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Costa Rica}} [[1969 CONCACAF Championship|1969]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1971 CONCACAF Championship|1971]]
|-  
| {{flagicon|Haiti|1964}} [[1973 CONCACAF Championship|1973]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Mexico}} [[1977 CONCACAF Championship|1977]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|0
|2
|0
|6
|-  
|{{flagicon|Honduras|1949}} [[1981 CONCACAF Championship|1981]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=3|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=3|''Did not enter''
|- 
| [[1985 CONCACAF Championship|1985]]
|-
| [[1989 CONCACAF Championship|1989]] 
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1991 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1991]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=3|''Did not qualify''
|5
|1
|2
|2
|5
|13
|-
| {{flagicon|MEX}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[1993 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1993]] 
|2	
|1	
|0	
|1	
|5	
|4
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1996 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1996]]
|3	
|1	
|0	
|2	
|4	
|6
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1998 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1998]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 |''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2000 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2000]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=3|''Did not qualify''
|3	
|1	
|1	
|1	
|2	
|4
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2002 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2002]]
|2	
|1	
|0	
|1	
|4	
|4
|-
| {{flagicon|MEX}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2003 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2003]]
|5
|2
|0
|3
|12
|9
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2005 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2005]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=3|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=3|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2007 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2007]] 
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2009 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2009]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2011 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2011]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=7|''Did not qualify''
|2	
|1	
|0	
|1	
|17	
|1	
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]] 
|9
|4
|3
|2
|14
|10
|-
| {{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2015 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2015]]
|6	
|2
|1
|3
|15
|11
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2017 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2017]]
|6
|3
|0
|3
|7
|9
|-
| {{flagicon|CRC}} {{flagicon|JAM}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2019 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2019]]
|4
|2
|0
|2
|9
|4
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2021]] 
|6
|2
|1
|3
|5
|5
|-
|{{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2023]] 
|6
|2	
|2
|2
|8
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|CAN}} {{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]
|Group stage
|12th
|3
|0
|1
|2
|3
|5
|6
|6
|0
|0
|27
|4
|-
!Total||Group stage||1/28||3||0||1||2||3||5||67||29||10||28||134||97
|}

===CONCACAF Nations League===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
! colspan="20" |[[CONCACAF Nations League]] record
|-
! colspan="10" |League
! rowspan="7" |
! colspan="9" |Finals
|-
!Season
!Division
!Group
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}} 
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
! width="35" |{{Tooltip|P/R|Promotion/relegation at end of season}}
!'''Finals'''
!'''Result'''
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Squad|Finals Squad Only}}
|-
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019–20]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group B|B]]
|6
|2
|1
|3
|5
|5
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2021]]
| colspan="8" rowspan="4" |''Ineligible''
|-
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League|2022–23]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group D|D]]
|6
|2
|2
|2
|8
|7
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2023]]
|-
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group B|B]]
|6
|3
|1
|2
|14
|6
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2024 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2024]]
|-
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League|2024–25]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group D|D]]
|6
|6
|0
|0
|27
|4
|{{rise}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2025]]
|-
!Total
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!24
!13
!4
!7
!54
!22
!'''—'''
!'''Total'''
!'''0 Titles'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
|}
{| class="wikitable collapsible collapsed" style="text-align: center;font-size:90%;"
|-
!colspan=2|CONCACAF Nations League history
|-
!First match
|{{fb|MSR}} 2–1 {{fb-rt|DOM}}<br>(7 September 2019; [[Blakes Estate Stadium|Lookout]], Montserrat)
|-
!Biggest win
|{{fb|BRB}} 0–5 {{fb-rt|DOM}}<br>(13 October 2023; [[Wildey, Barbados|Wildey]], Barbados)<br>{{fb|ATG}} 0–5 {{fb-rt|DOM}}<br>(12 October 2024; [[Devonshire Parish]], Bermuda)<br>{{fb|DOM}} 5–0 {{fb-rt|ATG}}<br>(15 October 2024; [[Devonshire Parish]], Bermuda)<br>{{fb|DMA}} 1–6 {{fb-rt|DOM}}<br>(16 November 2024; [[Santiago de los Caballeros]], Dominican Republic)<br>{{fb|DOM}} 6–1 {{fb-rt|BER}}<br>(19 November 2024; [[Santiago de los Caballeros]], Dominican Republic)
|-
!Biggest defeat
|{{fb|SLV}} 2–0 {{fb-rt|DOM}}<br>(19 November 2019; [[San Salvador]], El Salvador)<br />{{fb|GUA}} 2–0 {{fb-rt|DOM}}<br />(13 June 2022; [[Guatemala City]], Guatemala)
|-
!Best result
|—
|-
!Worst result
|—
|}

===CFU Caribbean Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[CFU Championship]] & [[Caribbean Cup]] record
|rowspan=28|
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{abbr|Pld|Games played}}
!{{abbr|W|Won}}
!{{abbr|D|Drawn}}
!{{abbr|L|Lost}}
!{{abbr|GF|Goals for}}
!{{abbr|GA|Goals against}}
!Pld
!W
!D
!L
!GF
!GA
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1978 CFU Championship|1978]]||colspan=8 rowspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|SUR}} [[1979 CFU Championship|1979]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Puerto Rico}} [[1981 CFU Championship|1981]]
|-
|{{flagicon|French Guiana}} [[1983 CFU Championship|1983]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Barbados}} [[1985 CFU Championship|1985]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Martinique|snake}} [[1988 CFU Championship|1988]]
|- 
|{{flagicon|BAR}} [[1989 Caribbean Cup|1989]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1990 Caribbean Cup|1990]]
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991]]||Group stage||6th||3||0||1||2||1||11
||2||1||1||0||4||2
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1992 Caribbean Cup|1992]]||colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1993 Caribbean Cup|1993]]||colspan=8 rowspan=4|''Did not qualify''
||2||1||0||1||5||4
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1994 Caribbean Cup|1994]]
||1||0||0||1||0||1
|-
|{{flagicon|CAY}} {{flagicon|JAM}} [[1995 Caribbean Cup|1995]]
||3||1||0||2||4||6
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1996 Caribbean Cup|1996]]
||2||0||1||1||1||7
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} {{flagicon|SKN}} [[1997 Caribbean Cup|1997]]||colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} {{flagicon|TRI}} [[1998 Caribbean Cup|1998]]||colspan=8 rowspan=3|''Did not qualify''
||2||1||0||1||3||6
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1999 Caribbean Cup|1999]]
||3||1||1||1||2||4
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2001 Caribbean Cup|2001]]
||2||1||0||1||4||4
|-
|{{flagicon|BRB}} [[2005 Caribbean Cup|2005]]||colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2007 Caribbean Cup|2007]]
||6||3||0||3||12||11
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2008 Caribbean Cup|2008]]||colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2010 Caribbean Cup|2010]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
||2||1||0||1||17||1
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} [[2012 Caribbean Cup|2012]]||Group stage||5th||3||1||0||2||3||4
||6||4||2||0||11||5
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2014 Caribbean Cup|2014]]||colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Did not qualify''
||6||2||1||3||15||11
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2017 Caribbean Cup|2017]]
||6||3||0||3||7||9
|-
!Total||Group stage||2/25||6||1||1||4||4||16
!43||19||6||18||85||71
|}

===Pan American Games===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|- 
!colspan=9|[[Football at the Pan American Games|Pan American Games]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Abbr|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Abbr|W|Won}}
!{{Abbr|D|Drawn}}
!{{Abbr|L|Lost}}
!{{Abbr|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Abbr|GA|Goals against}}
|- 
| {{flagicon|Argentina}} [[Football at the 1951 Pan American Games|1951]]||colspan=8 rowspan=5|''Did not enter''
|- 
| {{flagicon|Mexico}} [[Football at the 1955 Pan American Games|1955]]
|-
| {{flagicon|United States}} [[Football at the 1959 Pan American Games|1959]]
|- 
| {{flagicon|Brazil}} [[Football at the 1963 Pan American Games|1963]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Canada}} [[Football at the 1967 Pan American Games|1967]]
|-
| {{flagicon|Colombia}} [[Football at the 1971 Pan American Games|1971]]||Preliminary round||12th||3||0||0||3||2||12
|-
| {{flagicon|Mexico}} [[Football at the 1975 Pan American Games|1975]]||colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|Puerto Rico|1952}} [[Football at the 1979 Pan American Games|1979]]||Preliminary round||12th||2||0||0||2||0||7
|- 
| {{flagicon|Venezuela}} [[Football at the 1983 Pan American Games|1983]]||colspan=8 rowspan=5|''Did not enter''
|- 
| {{flagicon|United States}} [[Football at the 1987 Pan American Games|1987]]
|- 
| {{flagicon|Cuba}} [[Football at the 1991 Pan American Games|1991]]
|- 
| {{flagicon|Argentina}} [[Football at the 1995 Pan American Games|1995]]
|- 
| {{flagicon|Canada}} [[Football at the 1999 Pan American Games – Men's tournament|1999]]
|-
|style="border: 3px solid red"|{{flagicon|Dominican Republic}} [[Football at the 2003 Pan American Games – Men's tournament|2003]]||Preliminary round||6th||3||0||1||2||2||10
|-
| {{flagicon|Brazil}} [[Football at the 2007 Pan American Games – Men's tournament|2007]]||colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|Mexico}} [[Football at the 2011 Pan American Games – Men's tournament|2011]]||colspan=8 rowspan=3|''Did not qualify''
|-
| {{flagicon|Canada}} [[Football at the 2015 Pan American Games – Men's tournament|2015]]
|- 
| {{flagicon|Peru}} [[Football at the 2019 Pan American Games – Men's tournament|2019]]
|- 
| {{flagicon|Chile}} [[Football at the 2023 Pan American Games|2023]]||Group Stages||7th||3||0||1||2||0||6
|- 
!Total||Preliminary round||4/19||11||0||2||9||5||35
|}

==See also==
{{portal|Association football|Dominican Republic}}
* [[Dominican Republic national under-23 football team]]
* [[Dominican Republic national under-20 football team]]
* [[Dominican Republic national under-17 football team]]
* [[Football in the Dominican Republic]]

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
* {{official website|https://fedofutbol.do/}} {{in lang|es}}
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20071025054157/http://www.fifa.com/associations/association=dom/ Dominican Republic] – [[FIFA]] profile (archived 25 October 2007)

{{Dominican Republic national football team}}
{{Navboxes 
| title = Links to related articles 
| titlestyle = background:#002D62; color:white; border:1px solid #CE1126
| list =
{{Football in the Dominican Republic}}
{{CONCACAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of the Dominican Republic}}
}}
{{Portal bar|Association football|Dominican Republic}}

[[Category:Dominican Republic national football team| ]]
[[Category:Caribbean national association football teams]]
